entries.description: Step 3.5: authored ai-assignment.md for all 5 sessions via route(analysis) -> gemini-pro. Also at session start: removed a stale never-committed session-state.json (4 generic untitled sessions vs the spec 5) so start_session reseeded the ledger from spec.md headings; Session 1 registered to claude-code/claude-fable-5/high.

Extended the set scan (fileSystem.ts readSessionSets) with the two D1 derived inputs: externalVerificationNoteExists (existence probe for the Set 057 external-verification.md out-of-band record) and completedVerification (latest completed type:verification ledger entry's verdict + session number, lifted from the same normalized ledger the Set 061 plus-fraction reads). Plus the derived verificationMarker glyph. All three carried on the in-memory SessionSet record (types.ts: VerificationMarkerGlyph, CompletedVerificationInfo); never persisted.

Pure D1 predicates in tierLegibility.ts beside shouldRenderPlusFraction: verificationMarkerFor(tier, mode, ledger, noteExists, rowState) -> 'v?'|'v+'|'' with the locked suppression rules (Full rows, cancelled, Mode-A note present, completed verification session, Mode-B terminal); helpers allWorkSessionsComplete (>=1 work session, all complete; malformed reads work-open - conservative), completedVerificationInfo / hasCompletedVerificationSession (latest completed typed entry; malformed metadata degrades to null fields without disqualifying the entry); verificationMarkerTooltipFor with the locked D1 tooltip copy. LedgerSessionLike widened with optional status/number/verificationVerdict.

Rendering via the lw-marker pattern: SessionSetsModel verificationMarker/verificationTooltip/verdictFractionTooltip pure helpers; RowPayload gains verificationMarker + verificationTooltip (sessionSetsWebviewProtocol.ts); toRowPayload ships them and the fraction tooltip's non-plus slot now carries the verified-row enrichment 'Verification: <verdict> (session N)'; client.js renders the quiet span (role=button, tabindex=0) and wires click/Enter/Space to the EXISTING showRowContextMenu message (stopPropagation so row activation doesn't also fire; no new mutation path); tree.css quiet style (help cursor, hover/focus brighten). Tests: new verificationMarker.test.ts (predicate matrix, ledger helpers, tooltip copy, model helpers, readSessionSets e2e disk fixtures incl. note present/absent + typed in-flight/completed, payload+rendering source scans); 7 SessionSet fixture builders gained the 3 new fields. Suites: TS 788 passing + 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (baseline 752 before this session); Python 1185 passed / 1 skipped; drift_guard OK; dist rebuilt in-sync via esbuild.

Cross-provider verification: VERIFIED, 0 issues (s1-verification.md). Verifier gemini-2.5-pro via direct call_model fallback after the router first-choice gpt-5-4 hit OpenAI 429 rate limits (3 retries) - same ladder fallback as the 061 S4 close earlier today. Tokens 16079 in / 121 out; cost ~$0.0213 ESTIMATED from token counts (direct call bypasses router metrics).

verificationModeRewrite.ts: pure byte-preserving rewriter for the spec-config verificationMode: scalar - sibling of tierRewrite.ts (same CONFIG_BLOCK_RE, same outcome enum rewritten/already-target/no-config-block, same quote/comment/CRLF preservation and absent-key insertion, default out-of-band-or-none, typo-repair path). Plus verificationModeRecordExists - TS mirror of Python has_verification_mode_record (kind=verification_mode + valid choice; tolerant of missing/unparseable logs) - the D3 durable-record gate that refuses the seed rewrite once the Set 057 capture has fired. 19-test matrix in verificationModeRewrite.test.ts incl. sibling-key isolation and record-gate cases.

dabbler.copyVerificationKickoffPrompt: buildVerificationKickoffPrompt in copyPromptCommands.ts (D2, pointer-style L1) - references the workflow doc's Mode B section, instructs the agent to confirm it is a DIFFERENT engine via the per-session orchestrator blocks, open the typed session via the blessed start_session --type verification (never hand-edit the state file), record the verdict, chain remediation via --type remediation --handoff --handoff-verdict ISSUES_FOUND; embeds no doc bodies. Backtick defense extended to the set-dir path spliced into command lines. ActionRegistry copyEval entry 'Verification Kickoff' (group 306) on Lightweight dedicated-sessions rows with no completed verification session, cancelled excluded. 8 content tests.

dabblerSessionSets.setupVerification ('Set Up Dedicated Verification...', flat group 505): not-started Lightweight rows only this session (predicate widens to complete Mode-A rows in Session 3 via the blessed writer). Handler: defense-in-depth re-checks (tier/state), durable-record refusal via verificationModeRecordExists (no drift by construction), mode QuickPick with current-mode annotation (both directions legal pre-record, mirroring Switch Tier), explicit confirmation step whose one-way consequence copy names the N/M+ growth (A->B) or the out-of-band default posture (B->A), seed rewrite via the pure helper (same-mode pick repairs malformed scalars per S061-S3-V1-002), refresh + toast. Pure pickable-content builders exported and pinned in setupVerification.test.ts (10 tests incl. no-'unverified'-language).

Reused dabbler.openExternalVerificationDoc (already item-aware) as a flat row action 'Open External Verification Note' (group 506) surfaced exactly on v? rows (predicate: verificationMarker === 'v?' - the derived glyph already encodes every suppression rule); RowAction gained an optional detail field, passed through buildTopLevelItems/buildSubmenuItems to the QuickPick, carrying 'creating external-verification.md clears the v? marker'. package.json: 2 new command contributions; extension.ts: registerSetupVerificationCommand (safeRegister); watcherInventory allowlist lines bumped 191->192 / 227->228 for the import shift (the recurring Set 051/059 gotcha).

Suites: TS unit 831 passing (was 788 after S1; +43 this session) + the 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (configEditor-foundation, notificationsSection - unchanged baseline); tsc --noEmit clean; esbuild compile + template-bundle copy clean; Python 1185 passed / 1 skipped (no Python touched). ActionRegistry count test updated 17->20 with per-state x tier x mode applicability matrices for the three new entries.

Cross-provider verification (router pick gpt-5-4, OpenAI recovered from yesterday's 429s): R1 ISSUES_FOUND - 1 Major S062-S2-V1-001 (the setupVerification gate only checked for a verification_mode record and failed open on unreadable logs; D3's locked language is 'any activity-log record' + fail-loud). Finding ACCEPTED and fixed: new inspectActivityLog (no-records|has-records|unreadable) gates the command broadly and fail-loud; verificationModeRecordExists retained as the Python-parity helper only; +4 gate tests (TS suite 835 passing, same 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures). R2 narrow re-verify: VERIFIED 0 issues. Artifacts: s2-verification.md, s2-issues.json (resolution annotated), s2-verification-round-2.md. Routed cost R1 $0.2608 + R2 $0.0475 = $0.3083.

Audit-first (spec D4): traced every consumer of the recorded verificationMode. F1 read_verification_mode (dedicated_verification.py:138) is the single choke point - validate_dedicated_verification:544, derive_workflow_state:809, and close_session Q6 gate (close_session.py:1692-1700) all resolve through it (last valid kind==verification_mode entry wins). F2 start_session --type does NOT read the mode (register_typed_session_start gates only on type/plan/in-flight) so no start_session change is needed. F3 HAZARD: has_verification_mode_record only counts the original kind, and _capture_verification_mode runs on every start_session - a later typed-session start on a set whose only record is verification_mode_change would re-capture a stale out-of-band spec seed AFTER the change record and silently disarm the Q6 gate under last-wins; fix = idempotency check recognizes both kinds. F4 tier gate reads spec tier; Explorer reads spec only (unchanged); TS verificationModeRecordExists mirrors the Python check and gains both-kinds parity. Full findings + locked design consequences in s3-mode-read-audit.md (written before any code).

D4 blessed writer shipped: dedicated_verification.change_verification_mode (VerificationModeChangeResult w/ stable refused-* codes) + CLI ai_router/change_verification_mode.py (positional dir-or-slug, --to, --json; exit 0/2/3 mirroring start_session). Gates in order, fail-loud, nothing written on refusal: target dedicated-sessions only (B->A always refused) -> dir+spec+tier lightweight (fail closed on unconfirmable tier) -> existing-but-unreadable activity log refused (S2 fail-loud lesson; missing log created minimal) -> effective recorded mode out-of-band-or-none -> no typed sessions + nothing in flight (state must normalize; plan-less in-progress counts as in flight). Record: kind=verification_mode_change, choice, previousMode, attributed to highest completed session, atomic temp-rename write (extracted shared _write_activity_log_atomic). Read path: read_verification_mode + has_verification_mode_record now honor BOTH kinds (last valid wins) - closes audit F3 capture-clobber hazard. 29 new tests in test_change_verification_mode.py (every gate, precedence, capture idempotency, validator/derive_state integration, CLI exit codes + JSON envelope).

Extension wiring: ActionRegistry setupVerificationEligible widened to lightweight AND (not-started OR (complete AND mode A)) - complete Mode-B/in-progress/cancelled/Full excluded. setupVerification.ts state-dispatches: complete Mode-A -> straight-to-confirmation (A->B only, one-way N/M+ consequence copy) -> spawns the blessed writer via resolvePythonInterpreter + cp.spawn -m ai_router.change_verification_mode <dir> --json (upgradeOlderSets Set-050 precedent, isAiRouterNotInstalled stderr detection); ONLY on writer success aligns spec seed (rewriteSpecVerificationMode) + copies buildVerificationKickoffPrompt + locked toast; refusals/spawn failures inform and change NOTHING (D3 no-drift-by-construction); seed-alignment failure after success warns w/ manual fix but keeps record authoritative. Pure helpers buildChangeWriterArgs/parseChangeWriterOutput exported for hostless tests + CHANGE_WRITER_MODULE pinned against the real ai_router file (cross-language drift guard). verificationModeRecordExists TS mirror gained both-kinds parity.

Docs: workflow doc gained the normative Sanctioned Mode A -> Mode B transition subsection under Capturing-the-choice (locked rationale verbatim: additive A->B, recorded-not-snuck, B->A refused; full gate list; Explorer phasing; start_session --type never reads the mode). Pointer-level updates: authoring guide field semantics, spec-md-schema verificationMode paragraph, tier-model chosen-once parenthetical, session-state-schema typed-session rules (both record kinds + read-path precedence). ai_router/CHANGELOG.md Unreleased entry (Added: CLI + library + new kind; Changed: read path + capture idempotency w/ the F3 hazard explained).

Cross-provider verification (router pick gpt-5-4, both rounds): R1 ISSUES_FOUND - 1 Critical S062-S3-V1-001 (claimed start_session --verification-mode could supersede a blessed change record incl. B->A) DISPROVEN by executed minimal repro: the capture path is immutable after ANY durable record (Set 057 Q5 check runs before cli_choice; this session extended it to both kinds) - context gap, the unchanged immutability code was not in the R1 diff; pinned by new regression test test_explicit_cli_b_to_a_cannot_supersede_change_record. 1 Major S062-S3-V1-002 ACCEPTED+FIXED: completed-set flow extracted to applyCompletedSetTransition(set, pythonPath, deps) w/ injected deps; 6 branch tests pin the invocation/fallback matrix (refusal + spawn/router failure touch NOTHING per the D3 no-drift lock; success aligns seed only after the record; seed-misalignment still copies prompt + warns). 1 Minor S062-S3-V1-003 DISPROVEN: docs/activity-log-schema.md does not exist; record kinds documented in the canonical homes all updated this session. Both challenges recorded via record_adjudication (context-gap / reverify-reshaped). R2 narrow re-verify w/ reshaped context (full capture-path bodies + repro output + fix diffs): VERIFIED 0 issues. s3-issues.json persisted w/ dispositions. Post-fix suites: Py 1216 passed/1 skipped, TS 849 passing + 2 pre-existing, tsc/esbuild clean. Routed: R1 $0.2928 + R2 $0.1086.

D6 fixture matrix authored at tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/test-fixtures/uat-matrix/: two hello-world consumer projects. hello-world-full = Full mid-progress control (1/3, session 2 in flight, no markers) + blocked-by-prereqs real-pending (002 -> 001 in-progress) + unknown-slug (003 -> 099-cdn-rollout) + needs-migration v3-on-disk (004, asterisk + Migrate-to-v4 action). hello-world-lightweight = the six LW states: Mode A not-started (lw marker, Switch Tier + setupVerification both-directions; deliberately NO activity log so the durable-record gate stays open), Mode A complete w/o note (v?), Mode A complete WITH external-verification.md (suppressed), Mode B mid-work (1/2+ only), Mode B work-complete (2/2+ AND v+ -- the awaiting-verification window: top-level in-progress with all work complete deliberately fails invariant rule 6, so the committed session-events.jsonl closeout events drive the count via the documented events-ledger fallback), Mode B verified (3/3 runtime-grown, typed session verdict VERIFIED on a different engine, no marker). Mode-B sets carry the kind=verification_mode capture record in their activity logs for realism. All sessionSetName fields match dir basenames; spec headings match ledger titles.

Generator shipped: scripts/make-uat-workspace.js (dependency-free node; exports makeUatWorkspace(targetParent) for tests + CLI main; ASCII-only output per the cp1252 lesson) + npm run make-uat-workspace + committed uat-matrix.code-workspace naming both projects. Copies the matrix to a fresh os.tmpdir()/dabbler-uat-workspace-* folder OUTSIDE the repo and prints the workspace file to open. Empirically confirmed: generator run end-to-end OK; drift_guard.py OK both before and after the CONTRIBUTING.md edit (one-active-set only scans the repo-root docs/session-sets/ so nested fixture sets are invisible to it; stale-framing DOES live-scan fixture markdown -- fixture prose avoids the banned phrasings, no allow-list needed); vsce ls shows 31 packaged entries with no test-fixtures/ or scripts/ leakage after the .vscodeignore additions.

Pinning suite src/test/suite/uatMatrixFixtures.test.ts (14 tests): derives every committed row through the REAL readSessionSets scan and asserts name/state/fraction inputs, verificationMarker, plusFraction, externalVerificationNoteExists, completedVerification verdict+number, needsMigration/target/schemaVersionOnDisk, blockedByPrereqs + unsatisfiedPrereqs (real-pending and unknown-slug variants), plus ActionRegistry applicability on fixture rows (switchTier, setupVerification, kickoff prompt, external-note action, migrateToV4). Generator coverage: workspace-file folder list pinned; disposable copy derives identically to the committed source (generated into a sandbox, cleaned up). 14/14 passing.

CONTRIBUTING.md gained the 'UAT fixture workspace' section (how to generate, row-inventory pointer, disposable-copy safety for mutating actions, refresh procedure via the pinning suite, drift-guard note); test-fixtures/uat-matrix/README.md carries the full row inventory + refresh steps. Suites: Python 1216 passed / 1 skipped; tsc --noEmit clean; TS unit 863 passing (+14 this session) + the 2 pre-existing Set-026 failures (configEditor-foundation, notificationsSection -- unchanged baseline).

Cross-provider verification (router pick gpt-5-4, both rounds): R1 ISSUES_FOUND - 1 Major S062-S4-V1-001 ('suite green' end state vs the 2 failing TS unit tests) judged a CONTEXT GAP: the 2 failures are the tracked pre-existing Set-026 baseline (configEditor-foundation, notificationsSection), unchanged since Set 052 and present in this set's S1-S3 - all of which closed VERIFIED with the identical caveat (S2/S3 by the same verifier); this session moved the baseline 849 -> 863 passing (+14, zero regressions). Adjudication recorded via record_adjudication (cause=context-gap, resolution=reverify-reshaped). R2 narrow re-verify with the reshaped context (S1-S3 precedent + persisted verdicts + Set-026 provenance): VERIFIED, 0 issues. Artifacts: s4-verification.md, s4-issues.json (disposition annotated), s4-verification-round-2.md. Routed cost R1 $0.1822 + R2 $0.0066 = $0.1888. CALIBRATION NOTE for S5: state the tracked-baseline convention (2 pre-existing Set-026 failures; green = zero regressions) in the R1 prompt up front - it would have saved this round, the exact context-gap lesson S3 recorded for unchanged gate-adjacent code.

Session 5 start (claude-code claude-fable-5 @ high, the S4-close routed recommendation). Plan: author the combined 061+062 UAT checklist with maximal ProgrammaticVerification coverage (operator directive this session: minimize operator UAT time - AI pre-verifies every mechanically-coverable row; the operator walk is confined to a short visual/interactive pass against the Session 4 fixture workspace), build a local .vsix, generate the fixture workspace, then hold for the operator UAT gate before any version bump.

Combined 061+062 UAT checklist authored (062-lightweight-verification-affordance-uat-checklist.json): 23 rows, 11 AI-pre-verified (Passes=true w/ named deterministic checks per the Set 058 convention), 12 operator rows shaped as one ordered ~15-minute walk against the generated fixture workspace (operator directive: minimize UAT time). Subsumes every 061 checklist row. Suite baseline cited in Notes: Py 1216 pass/1 skip; TS 864 pass + the 2 tracked Set-026 baseline fails; drift guard OK.

Two enabling fixes shipped during UAT prep, both flagged for the session verifier: (1) make-uat-workspace now pins dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath to the repo .venv in the GENERATED .code-workspace only (committed fixture stays machine-agnostic; new pinning test in uatMatrixFixtures.test.ts; CONTRIBUTING + matrix README updated) so writer/migrator row actions need zero setup. (2) REAL DEFECT found+fixed: migrator CLIs (migrate_v3_to_v4 banner+summary, migrate_session_state x2, migrate_lightweight_to_canonical_v4, check_migrations warning) printed Unicode arrows/em-dashes that crash cp1252 consoles - the extension spawn-pipe encoding - so the Migrate-to-v4 row action exited 1 AFTER the in-place write had succeeded. ASCII-only now (repo convention); empirical before/after runs on a generated workspace copy; migrator test modules re-run 154 passed; ai_router CHANGELOG Unreleased gains the Fixed entry (rides 0.17.0).

Pre-publish gate OPEN, handed to operator: local .vsix built (dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.29.0.vsix - version bumps only after UAT passes, per spec step order); fresh fixture workspace generated (dabbler-uat-workspace-0JZGgz) with pinned interpreter; blessed-writer success (exit 0, verification_mode_change appended) + refusal (exit 3) + migrator (exit 0 post-fix) all CLI-validated live against a generated copy before handoff. Operator walks the 12 pending checklist rows.

OPERATOR UAT PASSED 2026-06-12: all 12 operator-walk rows Passes=true (operator-saved results; only feedback = a cosmetic note on walk 1 about repeated 001..-style numbering across the two fixture projects - the rendered states matched the table). Checklist bookkeeping finished: Result flipped to complete on the 12 walked rows; the checklist-editor save had appended a duplicate 23-row block (Passes=false, no content) - removed, the operator-completed 23 rows are the record. Gate CLOSED.

Operator-requested pre-publish README refresh: hero image swapped to media/session-set-explorer-and-spec.png (replaces session-set-explorer-in-action; OLD png kept on disk until 0.30.0 publishes - the live 0.29.0 Marketplace page hotlinks raw@master, deleting now would break it; remove in the post-publish run-id commit); media/getting-started.png added under Get started; Copy Eval list updated to 6 prompts; flat-action list gains Switch Tier/Set Up Dedicated Verification/Open External Verification Note; new Lightweight-verification-at-a-glance feature bullet.

Versions bumped post-UAT per spec order: extension 0.29.0 -> 0.30.0 (npm version: package.json + both package-lock nodes) + CHANGELOG [0.30.0] 2026-06-12 entry naming Sets 061+062 (combined-release rationale, per-set Added sections, README note); ai_router 0.16.0 -> 0.17.0 (pyproject.toml + ai_router/__init__.py __version__ - the Set 049/051 drift gotcha checked deliberately) + CHANGELOG [Unreleased] -> [0.17.0] 2026-06-12; repository-reference.md release-status table + version walk updated in PRE-PUSH wording (publish PENDING, tags awaiting operator authorization; run ids recorded post-publish only). Drift guard OK post-edits.

Cross-provider verification (router pick gpt-5-4): R1 VERIFIED, 0 issues, $0.1720 - the first R1-clean round of the set. The R1 prompt led with the conventions block (suite baseline = TS 864 pass + the 2 tracked Set-026 fails / Py 1216 pass; pre-push release contract; operator-UAT result incl. the removed duplicate checklist block; synthetic-fixture rule) plus the unchanged gate-adjacent context (resolvePythonInterpreter precedence, committed .code-workspace) - the S3/S4 context-gap calibration applied and credited. Raw output saved unedited to s5-verification.md; structured findings to s5-issues.json (empty).

Final-session close-out artifacts: change-log.md (full 5-session narrative, releases HELD wording, deviations section, post-publish follow-ups incl. old-hero-png removal), disposition.json rewritten for Session 5 (verdict VERIFIED, 27 files_changed, next_orchestrator null - set ends), ai-assignment.md Session 5 actuals (orchestrator matched the routed recommendation; $0.1720 routed; calibration note: up-front conventions block is the default R1 shape now).
